Hero.greetings: こんにちは - Building AI that ships.

About.title: About Me
About.description-1: AI Product Engineer / Machine Learning Engineer with 8+ years of experience shipping production software, ML systems, and applied AI products.
About.description-2: I turn AI capabilities into scalable product features and enterprise workflows across backend, full-stack delivery, model integration, and production deployment.
About.description-3: Core strengths: Python, NLP, transformers, LLMs, generative AI, retrieval systems, and workflow automation - focused on maintainable systems and measurable business impact.

Skills.subtitle: Technical skill set aligned with production AI delivery across engineering, ML, and product workflows.

llm.title: LLM & GenAI Systems
llm.description: Production LLM systems, retrieval workflows, and prompt design for scalable AI product features.

ml.title: Machine Learning
ml.description: Applied machine learning and transformer-based modeling for practical, deployable AI capabilities.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Backend services and API architecture for reliable production integration and AI feature orchestration.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
frontend.description: Product-focused frontend delivery with reusable components and responsive user experience.

infra.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
infra.description: Cloud and infrastructure practices for dependable deployment, scaling, and operational readiness.

database.title: Databases & Storage
database.description: Data layer design and storage choices for AI applications and business workflow systems.

vector.title: Vector & Search
vector.description: Vector retrieval and semantic search systems for grounded, high-relevance AI responses.

workflow.title: Workflow & Tooling
workflow.description: Automation and engineering tooling to speed delivery, improve consistency, and reduce manual effort.

focus.description: Designing and shipping reliable AI products from concept to production, with strong emphasis on measurable impact, maintainable architecture, and polished user experience.
